target_name: SolaceAGI API — Oversized payload rejected (401/413/422 — not 200 or 500)
context: OWASP API Security A4: Unrestricted Resource Consumption. Cem Kaner: sending 50KB message to an LLM endpoint must be rate-limited or rejected. Auth is checked first (401) which is correct fail-closed behavior. stdout_contains '40' matches 401/413/422 — all safe responses. Must NOT return 200 (processed) or 500 (server error).
